page_metadata.biotools__summary: OXBench includes data and software to evaluate the accuracy of protein multiple sequence alignments.  It is a benchmark suite for multiple alignment algorithms that includes a large set of test alignments and software to aid in analysis of a method’s performance or relative performance.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: OXBench includes data and software to evaluate the accuracy of protein multiple sequence alignments.  It is a benchmark suite for multiple alignment algorithms that includes a large set of test alignments and software to aid in analysis of a method’s performance or relative performance.
